import os
import pickle
from pathlib import Path

def main():
    ckpt_dir = Path("checkpoints/baseline")
    ckpt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    model = {
        "type": "heuristic_utility_over_dist",
        "alpha": 2.0,
        "beta": 2.0,
        "description": "Global heuristic: selects target maximizing (utility**beta)/(dijkstra_dist**alpha+1) with alpha=2.0 beta=2.0 (higher beta prioritizes large frontier clusters). Uses cleaned Dijkstra+prev for scoring+next-hop. v16: compact COMPLETE non-truncated predict.py (robust config/glob fallback, per-ep try/except, exact contract JSON with per_episode/per_type/success-only dist + correct (1/N)sum S_i*(300/d_i)).",
        "version": "v16_alpha2.0_beta2.0"
    }
    with open(ckpt_dir / "model.pkl", "wb") as f:
        pickle.dump(model, f)
    print("Saved improved heuristic model to", ckpt_dir)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
